docs.title: gh-go
docs.text: A Github template to kick start a new Go module.

docs.title: Integrations
docs.text:
• buf for protobuf and gRPC.
  • sqlc for SQL backend.
  • golangci-lint for linters.
  • goreleaser for releases.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
# mkdocs
    mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
    docs/
        blog/     # Development log
        index.md  # The documentation homepage.
        ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

    # Go
    cmd/          # Binaries
        frontend/
        tools/
        ...
    internal/
        frontend/ # Internal libraries
        ...
    itest/        # Integration tests
        ...

    # Protobuf
    proto/
    gen/

    justfile      # Helper commands
